ORDER ON DEFENDANT'S DEMURRER TO PLAINTIFF'S COMPLAINT (SEE SCANNED ORDER FOR DETAILS)

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT AMIR SHAMIRZA'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND AND DEFENDANT'S REQUEST FOR JUDICIAL NOTICE IS GRANTED. PLAINTIFF IS PRECLUDED BY CCP SECTION 726 FROM BRINGING AN ACTION TO RECOVER AGAINST DEFENDANT BECAUSE PLAINTIFF HAS ALREADY BEGUN PURSUING A NON-JUDICIAL FORECLOSURE FOR THE SAME SECURED PROPERTY. THE FACT THAT DEFENDANT PERSONALLY GUARANTEED THE OBLIGATION OF APTELM LLC AKA 537 ELM LLC DOES NOT PERMIT PLAINTIFF TO SEEK REMEDIES FOR BREACH OF THE OBLIGATION BECAUSE, AS THE 100% MEMBER INTEREST HOLDER OF THE LLC, DEFENDANT WAS ALREADY LIABLE ON THE GUARANTEED OBLIGATION. (SEE CC 2787; CADLE CO. II V. HARVEY (2000) 83 CAL.APP.4TH 927, 932.) ORDER SIGNED. JUDGE: ERNEST H. GOLDSMITH; CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; REPORTER: SHERYL L. SAWYER, CSR # 5976 =302/EG

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT AMIR SHAMIRZA'S MOTION TO TRANSFER ACTION IS DENIED. THE AGREEMENT UNDERLYING THE ACTION SPECIFICALLY DESIGNATES SAN FRANCISCO AS THE PLACE OF PAYMENT, AND VENUE IS PROPER IN THE COUNTY WHERE THE OBLIGATION IS TO BE PERFORMED. (CCP 395(A).) DEMURRER TO CROSS COMPLAINT

Off Calendar Jun-22-2015 Continued To Nov-04-15 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Hearing On Motion To Dismiss Cross-Complaints First Amended Complaint
Off Calendar Apr-28-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Patricia H. Lyon, of French & Lyon, Tel. 415. 597.7849, for plaintiffs, appears via CourtCall;
Eunji C. Cho, of Mellen Law Firm, Tel. 650.638.0120, for defendants/cross-complainants, appears via CourtCall.

RULING. A R G U E D. The Court vacated its tentative ruling and ruled as follows: CROSS-DEFENDANT EAST WEST BANK'S Motion To Dismiss Cross-Complainants First Amended Complaint is granted. The Court finds that the language of the settlement agreement to be clear. Prevailing party shall prepare form of order that complies with CRC 3.1312. Judge Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk Felicia Green; Court Reporter Denise Doucette, CSR No. 5963; Dept. 302.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-07-2014 Continued To Dec-03-14 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Sep-10-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. PATRICIA H. LYON OF FRENCH & LYON, TEL. NO. 597-7849 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
ATTY. EUNJI CHO, TEL. NO. (650) 638-0120 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT.

RULING - A R G U E D; DEFENDANT AMIR SHAMIRZA's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is taken under submission. Each side to submit forms of order for the court's consideration. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Sheryl L. Sawyer, CSR # 5976 =302/eg

* * * AFTER HEARING THE COURT RULED AS FOLLOWS : DEFENDANT AMIR SHAMIRZA's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is sustained without leave to amend and Defendant's request for judicial notice is granted. Plaintiff is precluded by CCP section 726 from bringing an action to recover against Defendant because Plaintiff has already begun pursuing a non-judicial foreclosure for the same secured property. The fact that Defendant personally guaranteed the obligation of APTELM LLC aka 537 ELM LLC does not permit Plaintiff to seek remedies for breach of the obligation because, as the 100% member interest holder of the LLC, Defendant was already liable on the guaranteed obligation. (See CC 2787; Cadle Co. II v. Harvey (2000) 83 Cal.App.4th 927, 932.) ORDER SIGNED. * * *

APPLICATION AND HEARING FOR RIGHT TO ATTACH ORDER
Off Calendar Sep-10-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. PATRICIA H. LYON OF FRENCH & LYON, TEL. NO. 597-7849 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
ATTY. EUNJI CHO, TEL. NO. (650) 638-0120 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT.

RULING - PLAINTIFF EAST WEST BANK's APPLICATION AND HEARING FOR RIGHT TO ATTACH ORDER is taken under submission. Each side to submit forms of order for the court's consideration. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Sheryl L. Sawyer, CSR # 5976 =302/EG

* * * AFTER HEARING THE COURT RULED AS FOLLOWS: PLAINTIFF EAST WEST BANK's APPLICATION AND HEARING FOR RIGHT TO ATTACH ORDER - In light of the ruling on Defendant's Demurrer, Plaintiff's Application for Right to Attach Order is denied. ORDER SIGNED. * * *

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-14-2014 Continued To Sep-10-14 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn To Transfer Action
Off Calendar Jun-09-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: James French, Esq., 415.597.7813, for plaintiff East West Bank.
Bradley Kass, Esq., 650.579.0612, for defendant Amir Shahmirza.

RULING: Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling: DEFENDANT AMIR SHAMIRZA's motion To Transfer Action is denied. The agreement underlying the action specifically designates San Francisco as the place of payment, and venue is proper in the county where the obligation is to be performed. (CCP 395(a).) Order signed in open court. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: Sherry Sawyer #5976.
